parsed_review.summary: CP00-379 is a descriptor-only billing-core closeout pack (Risk C, 150 units, RP12.P05.M03.S19–RP12.P06.M00.S06) and its pack-level claims are supported by the inspected source. The implementation (registry.js/service.js/validators.js) produces deeply frozen, descriptor-only objects with 30+ no-write/no-runtime flags false and no_real_data true; no fs-write, network, db, or child_process calls exist anywhere in packages/billing/src. Coverage, deliverable distribution (58/48/7/13/18/6=150), micro-phase and micro-title counts all match the baseline exactly, and the contract + validator script deep-equal the generated descriptor/attestation/requirements. Tests (model.test.js) assert coverage, descriptor-only rows, authority boundaries, no Claude promotion, and no enterprise-trust-from-local-validation; command-evidence shows all node --check/--test plus the full repo validate/test suite passed (exit 0). Authority boundaries are intact: Claude is a read-only [Read,Grep,Glob] reviewer and not final approver, human final approval is required, and the hardened_review_sequence places adjudication, construction inspection, and final closeout validation AFTER this run. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor evidence packets (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false), not product runtime. CP178+ review-hardening blockers (auth failure, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields, final-approval/enterprise-trust claims) are encoded, and the auth preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON. The pack honestly reports production_ready:false / implemented_pending_review, which is the correct state for descriptor-only foundation work pending post-review closeout. One non-blocking P3: the manifest references post-review evidence artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) not yet present, which is the documented post-review gating sequence rather than a defect.

findings.title: Manifest references post-review evidence artifacts not yet present (expected, non-blocking)
findings.details: The manifest implementation_summary.evidence_refs and per-unit evidence_refs list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-379/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist in that directory (confirmed via Glob). This is consistent with the documented gating model: command-evidence.json notes these are 'Post-review gated commands (require claude-review-result.json produced from the accepted review) ... executed and recorded before commit,' and registry.js hardened_review_sequence orders finding_adjudication, construction_inspection, and final_closeout_validation AFTER this read-only Claude run. The pack correctly reports production_ready:false / status implemented_pending_review, so the forward references are expected outputs of the closeout sequence Claude is part of, not a missing-evidence defect.
findings.recommendation: No code change required. During final closeout, confirm claude-review-result.json (normalized from this review), adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are generated and that npm run closeout-pack:validate passes before commit, so the manifest's evidence_refs resolve.
